contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Blog post on truesight_me: 'The oracle feedback loop: how daily offline activity becomes tomorrow's advisory context'. Plain-language walkthrough for non-technical readers of the three offline input channels (git merges, live sheets, iOS reminders) feeding ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT.md, how truesight.me pages are public windows onto the same activity, and what the April 21 shipment closed end-to-end. Three inline SVG infographics (hero loop, three-channels-to-snapshot, 15-stage pipeline funnel with close-zone highlights), vector card thumbnail, new card at top of blog/index.html. PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/45 (merged d8db274e). Live: https://truesight.me/blog/posts/oracle-feedback-loop-offline-activity-to-daily-advisory.html. Pair-worked with Claude Code (Opus 4.7, 1M ctx).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
